violations.text: The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Establishment has contacted contractor and is waiting for a date. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. PIC just took test and is waiting results. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The bar and kitchen is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand wash sink must be installed in both the kitchen and bar. Per PIC contractor will be at establishment tomorrow. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The bar and kitchen is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand wash sink must be installed in both the kitchen and bar. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

Milk and sour cream were observed held at 55-57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The sliding door refrigerator was observed with an ambient of 55 degrees. Unit must only be used to store non TCS foods (beer, soda, water.) New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
The ceiling in the beer walk-in was observed with a leak. Per PIC, ceiling is scheduled to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
